query_normalized: evaluating the impact of code style on llm code generation diversity computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on evaluating LLM performance in "copilot-style" completion and infill tasks (accuracy, logical consistency, contextual understanding) but does not measure or analyze "code style" as an independent variable nor "generation diversity" as a dependent variable. It fails to satisfy criteria (a) or (b) because it lacks the specific mechanism (style impact) and outcome (diversity metrics) required by the user's question, and it is not a foundational methodology paper (d) for style-di
